name: groove
description: Groove API 컬렉션을 헤드리스 검증한다 (이슈 #141). 기본은 Bruno(bruno/), 레거시 Postman(postman/)도 병행 유지. 백엔드(localhost:8080)와 데모 시드가 떠 있어야 한다.

scripts.test:bruno: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --exclude-tags members,coupons,admin,cleanup,ratelimit
scripts.test:bruno:admin: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --tags admin
scripts.test:bruno:full: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --exclude-tags cleanup,ratelimit
scripts.test:bruno:cleanup: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --tags cleanup
scripts.test:bruno:ratelimit: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --tags ratelimit
scripts.test:bruno:report: cd bruno && bru run -r --env "Groove Local" --exclude-tags members,coupons,admin,cleanup,ratelimit --reporter-junit ../reports/bruno-junit.xml
scripts.test:postman: newman run postman/groove.collection.json -e postman/groove.environment.json --folder "0. Health" --folder "1. Auth" --folder "3. Catalog (Public)" --folder "4. Cart" --folder "6. Member Flow (E2E) ★" --folder "7. Guest Flow" --folder "9. Edge Cases (시연용)"
scripts.test:postman:full: newman run postman/groove.collection.json -e postman/groove.environment.json --folder "0. Health" --folder "1. Auth" --folder "2. Members (Self-Service)" --folder "3. Catalog (Public)" --folder "4. Cart" --folder "5. Coupons" --folder "6. Member Flow (E2E) ★" --folder "7. Guest Flow" --folder "8. Admin" --folder "9. Edge Cases (시연용)"
scripts.test:postman:cleanup: newman run postman/groove.collection.json -e postman/groove.environment.json --folder "10. Cleanup (파괴적 · 전체 실행 시 마지막)"
scripts.test:postman:ratelimit: newman run postman/groove.collection.json -e postman/groove.environment.json --folder "11. Rate Limit (격리 실행)"
